title: Accessible Names, Images, Language, Headings, Landmarks, and Human Review · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed crawl review reconstructs accessible names, images, language, headings, landmarks, and human review from authorization, revision, seed, URL key, response identity, robots decision, parse record, extraction provenance, frontier event, report row, failure, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for accessible page-quality audit with human-review handoff after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice…
objectives: Check declared page and part language, document title presence and purpose, and conflicts with observed content while retaining human-review limits.
Extract headings, labels, sections, and landmarks in document context and flag missing or misleading structure without enforcing a simplistic numeric ladder.
Classify informative, decorative, functional, complex, grouped, linked, and text images and assess alternative evidence in context.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Map each automated finding to testable evidence, confidence, false-positive risk, required manual checks, and no-conformance claim.
